title: [InstCombine][profcheck] Add unknown branch weights to selects created in InstCombineAndOrXor.cpp
author: alanzhao1
description:
These select instructions were created from combinations of bitwise operators which have no branch weight information.

Tracking issue: #147390

tests.test_body:
define i16 @lshr_shl_pow2_const_xor(i16 %x) {
  %lshr1 = lshr i16 256, %x
  %shl = shl i16 %lshr1, 2
  %and = and i16 %shl, 8
  %r = xor i16 %and, 8
  ret i16 %r
}

define i16 @not_invert_signbit_splat_mask2(i8 %x, i16 %y) {
  %a = ashr i8 %x, 6
  %n = xor i8 %a, -1
  %s = sext i8 %n to i16
  %r = and i16 %s, %y
  ret i16 %r
}

declare void @use(i32)

define i32 @xor_sext_to_sel_multi_use_constant_mask(i1 %y) {
  %sext = sext i1 %y to i32
  call void @use(i32 %sext)
  %r = xor i32 %sext, 42
  ret i32 %r
}

declare void @use(i32)

define i32 @and_sext_to_sel_multi_use_constant_mask(i1 %y) {
  %sext = sext i1 %y to i32
  call void @use(i32 %sext)
  %r = and i32 %sext, 42
  ret i32 %r
}

define i32 @and_add_bool_to_select_multi_use(i1 %x, i32 %y) {
  %val = zext i1 %x to i32
  %mask = add i32 -1, %val
  %res = and i32 %mask, %y
  %ret = add i32 %res, %mask
  ret i32 %ret
}

declare void @use(i32)

define i32 @and_not_zext_to_sel(i32 %x, i1 %y) {
  %zext = zext i1 %y to i32
  call void @use(i32 %zext)
  %not = xor i32 %zext, -1
  %r = and i32 %not, %x
  ret i32 %r
}

define i8 @extrause111_v2(i8 %x, i1 %cond) {
  %cond.splat0 = sext i1 %cond to i8
  call void @use.i8(i8 %cond.splat0)
  %cond.splat1 = sext i1 %cond to i8
  call void @use.i8(i8 %cond.splat1)
  %sub = add i8 %cond.splat0, %x
  call void @use.i8(i8 %sub)
  %xor = xor i8 %sub, %cond.splat1
  ret i8 %xor
}

declare void @use.i8(i8)

define <4 x i32> @neg_or_ashr_i32_vec_commute(<4 x i32> %x0) {
  %x = sdiv <4 x i32> splat (i32 42), %x0
  %neg = sub <4 x i32> zeroinitializer, %x
  %or = or <4 x i32> %x, %neg
  %shr = ashr <4 x i32> %or, splat (i32 31)
  ret <4 x i32> %shr
}
